common.wireframeNotice: Wireframe screen — placeholder content, no live data or backend calls yet.

home.title: SHG Smart Market Linkage Platform
home.subtitle: Sprint 0 wireframes (T04) — SHG-facing screens and official dashboards, implemented as real routed pages instead of Figma.

registration.title: SHG Registration
registration.groupNameHint: Enter the name of your Self Help Group
registration.uploadPhotoHint: Tap to take or choose a photo
registration.successBody: An MEPMA official will review and confirm your SHG registration.

voice.title: Voice Assistant
voice.quickCommand1: What is the price of turmeric powder?
voice.sampleUser: How do I list a new product?
voice.sampleAssistant: Tap Add Product on the catalogue screen, then speak the product name, price and quantity.

districtDashboard.title: District Dashboard
districtDashboard.subtitle: MEPMA district officer view — SHG performance across ULBs and mandals.

ulbDashboard.title: ULB Dashboard
ulbDashboard.subtitle: Urban Local Body officer view — SHG and product performance within the ULB.

shgDashboard.title: SHG Dashboard
shgDashboard.subtitle: Per-SHG monitoring view — membership, product mix and sales for a single group.

productDashboard.title: Product Dashboard
productDashboard.subtitle: Catalogue-wide view — category performance, pricing and inventory signals.

buyerDashboard.title: Buyer Dashboard
buyerDashboard.subtitle: Buyer engagement view — registered buyers, repeat orders and demand trends.

governmentDashboard.title: Government Dashboard
governmentDashboard.subtitle: State-level (MEPMA HQ) view across all districts — Module 7 policy & monitoring dashboard.
governmentDashboard.mapPlaceholder: Map visualisation placeholder — district heat-map lands with the mapping library in a later sprint.

admin.title: Admin
admin.subtitle: Platform administration — users, roles and content moderation.
admin.inviteUserBody: Send an invitation email with a role assignment. This is a wireframe action and does not send a real email yet.
